title: Achyronia ulicina
taxonomy: Achyronia ulicina is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It belongs to the genus Achyronia and is native to Australia. The plant is also known as the Australian pea or small-flowered pea. Further classification places Achyronia ulicina in the subfamily Faboideae. Its classification is a part of the broader categorization of legumes within the plant kingdom.
